staticCommands.description: A command line utility to create new encryption key pairs.

staticCommands.name: new
staticCommands.description: Generate a new Ed25519 key pair.

options.description: Output format of the key pair. Possible values: base64, byte or hex. Default is 'base64' string.

staticCommands.name: recover
staticCommands.description: Recover the public key from a Ed25519 private key.

options.description: Input format of the public key. Possible values: base64 or hex. Default is 'base64' string.
Output format of the key pair. Possible values: base64, byte or hex. Default is 'base64' string.
